title: Elbow Grease Dish Brush Refill Sponges | Non Scratch Easy Fit to Handle, Washing Up Sponge Refills, Kitchen & Dish Cleaning Scrub Scourer (Pink - 3 Pack)
features: THE SPONGE THAT KEEPS UP: Elbow Grease refill sponges are made for simple, everyday convenience in busy homes. When the sink is full and time is short, a quick refill helps keep dish washing moving smoothly.

EASY REFILL DESIGN: Simply slide each sponge on and swap the old one out in seconds. It is a handy fix for busy kitchens, making dish washing feel quicker when breakfast plates or evening pans start piling up.
NON SCRATCH CLEANING: These refill sponges are tough on daily mess but gentle on surfaces. They are great for dish washing glasses, plates and coated cookware without leaving scratches behind.
VALUE 3 PACK: With three Elbow Grease sponge refills in one pack, there is always a fresh one ready to go. It is ideal for busy family homes where the washing up seems never-ending after every meal.

MADE FOR ELBOW GREASE: Designed to fit the Elbow Grease dish brush, these refills slide on with ease for a secure hold. That means less fuss at the sink and more time getting through cups, bowls and cutlery.

BRILLIANT FOR DAILY DISH WASHING: From cereal bowls in the morning to roasting trays at night, these sponges help keep dish washing under control. They make everyday clean ups feel simpler and less of a chore.

FRESH SPONGE WHEN NEEDED: Replacing the sponge head is a quick way to keep the dish brush feeling cleaner and ready to use. It is perfect for freshening things up after tackling greasy pans or sauce-covered dishes.

COMFORTABLE KITCHEN CLEAN UPS: A simple slide on refill helps keep the brush ready for everyday use without extra hassle. It is a handy choice for quick rinses after lunch or full sink loads after a family dinner.

GENTLE ON EVERYDAY ITEMS: The non scratch sponge suits regular dish washing on mugs, plates and glassware. It gives peace of mind when cleaning favourite cups, everyday crockery and other delicate kitchen essentials.

PRACTICAL SINK SIDE ESSENTIAL: Keeping spare sponge refills close by makes kitchen clean ups feel far more manageable. They are great when one sponge has worn down and there is still a full load of washing up waiting.
description: Keep the washing up moving with Elbow Grease Dish Brush Refill Sponges. This handy 3 pack is made for the Elbow Grease dish brush and gives kitchens an easy way to stay stocked up with fresh sponge heads, ready for daily dish washing. Each sponge is non scratch, so it is ideal for cleaning plates, bowls, mugs, glasses, cutlery and cookware without worrying about marks on surfaces. That makes them a smart choice for everything from quick morning clean ups to the larger after dinner pile that always seems to appear at the worst time. Designed with convenience in mind, these Elbow Grease sponge refills are simple to use. Just slide one on and the dish brush is ready to get back to work. There is no complicated fitting, no extra fuss and no need to replace the whole brush. It is a small kitchen switch that makes a big difference, especially in busy homes where dish washing is part of the everyday routine. A fresh sponge can help the whole sink side set up feel cleaner, easier and far more ready for the next round of cups, pans and plates. The non scratch finish means these sponge refills are practical as well as versatile. They can be used across all kinds of dish washing tasks, whether that means tackling greasy dinner plates, rinsing out tea-stained mugs or freshening up pans after cooking. They are tough enough for daily use but gentle enough for the items people reach for again and again. With three refill sponges in every value pack, there is always a spare ready when one needs changing. Elbow Grease makes everyday cleaning feel that bit easier, and these refill sponges are no exception. They help keep the dish brush going for longer, cut down on hassle at the sink and make it easier to stay on top of kitchen mess as it happens. For anyone looking for a simple, reliable sponge refill for dish washing, this 3 pack is an easy win.
